positive: A stylized, mystical forest scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna, dominated by strong contrasts of deep midnight blues, vibrant emerald greens, and pops of ethereal gold. The central composition focuses on a winding path leading into a glowing portal or waterfall, creating a clear, silhouette-friendly focal point. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometric patterning and highly detailed nature illustration, making it look perfect for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, clean linework, symmetrical composition, flat vector elements integrated with soft glow effects. --ar 1:1 --style illustration --s 750
